free_text: Identification and spectrometry of charged particles
produced in reactions induced by 14 MeV neutrons (II)
of data at footnotes of the figs. (II - second part)
On tritiated Ti, creating a neutron flux,
corresponding to 10+6 associated alphas per sec..
Isotopic mixture of boron, dimensions - 11.4 by 30mm.
95% argon and 5% C-O2 at 60 and 30 Torr.
More details on the specific tasks of the detectors
can be found in the thesis.
Slightly for the neutron angular dispersion by
resolution degradation of the solid state counters.
Statistical error. For the integrated cross
sections this contains also the systematic error
of the extrapolation of the angular distribution.
